urls.description: Erowid is a non-profit educational & harm-reduction resource with 60 thousand pages of online information about psychoactive drugs, plants, chemicals, and technologies including entheogens, psychedelics, new psychoactive substances, research chemicals, stimulants, depressants and pharmaceuticals. This includes traditional, spiritual, and responsible use, info on health, effects, experiences, images, research, chemistry, law, media coverage, bibliographies and a whole lot more.
urls.title: Erowid

data.text:
昨天晚上的时候，psywiki好像被墙了一阵子，今天早上一看又好了......
不知道是哪位推友被晶哥要求供出了这个网站()
但是，Erowid有一个镜像站没有被墙，国内能直连，可以在上面看一些与💊有关的报告和知识，也可以在上面找药()
网址在这:https://t.co/zfGbE49vYj
这次不要向晶哥供出这个网站了哦~🥺
